---
title: "My paper in RBE - Panel Matching in PME"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-04-08"
categories:
  - "Colombia"
  - "Estadística"
---

[This paper](http://gutierrezandres.files.wordpress.com/2014/04/rbes237.pdf)

present useful R functions that perform matching of panels in the Brasilian labor force survey (Pesquisa Mensal de Emprego - PME). Hope you enjoy it!
